question: Show the name and theme for all concerts and the number of singers in each concert.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.concert_name ,  T2.theme ,  count(*) FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN concert AS T2 ON T1.concert_id  =  T2.concert_id GROUP BY T2.concert_id
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.attr_090955_identifier, T1.attr_f48457, COUNT(*) FROM concert AS T1 JOIN singer_in_concert AS T2 ON T1.attr_090955_key = T2.attr_090955_key GROUP BY T1.attr_090955_key;
raw_response: SELECT T1.attr_090955_identifier, T1.attr_f48457, COUNT(*) FROM concert AS T1 JOIN singer_in_concert AS T2 ON T1.attr_090955_key = T2.attr_090955_key GROUP BY T1.attr_090955_key;
